search.query: | tstats count where index=* by index | where count > 0 | fields index | sort index
| tstats count where index IN ($selected_indexes$) by sourcetype | fields sourcetype | sort sourcetype

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT risk_tags | where isnotnull(risk_tags) AND risk_tags!="" | stats count

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | stats count by ip | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT is_scanner, scanner_name, is_commercial_vpn | eval noise_category = case( is_scanner=="1" AND NOT (scanner_name=="null" OR isnull(scanner_name) OR scanner_name==""), "Known_Scanners", is_scanner=="1", "Scanners", is_commercial_vpn=="1", "Commercial_VPN" ) | where isnotnull(noise_category) | stats sum(count) as count by noise_category

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | stats count by ip | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT latitude, longitude, risk_score | where isnotnull(latitude) AND isnotnull(longitude) | geostats latfield=latitude longfield=longitude sum(count) by risk_score

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | stats count by ip | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT scanner_name | search scanner_name!="null" AND scanner_name!="" | where isnotnull(scanner_name) | stats sum(count) as count by scanner_name | sort - count

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | stats count by ip | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT risk_tags | where isnotnull(risk_tags) AND risk_tags!="" | eval risk_tags = replace(risk_tags, "[\[\]\"]", "") | makemv delim="," risk_tags | mvexpand risk_tags | eval threat_type = lower(trim(risk_tags)) | search threat_type IN ("c2", "cobalt-strike", "tor-exit-node", "honeypot", "risk-transfer", "pulse-signal") | stats sum(count) as count by threat_type

chart.title: Enriched Events - All Risk Tags Breakdown

search.query: index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | stats count by ip | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT risk_tags | eval risk_tags = replace(risk_tags, "[\[\]\"]", "") | makemv delim="," risk_tags | mvexpand risk_tags | eval risk_tag = trim(risk_tags) | search risk_tag!="" AND risk_tag!="null" | stats sum(count) as count by risk_tag | sort - count

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT risk_score, risk_tags, scanner_name | where risk_score == 2 | eval end_time = _time + 1 | table _time, end_time, ip, risk_score, risk_tags, scanner_name, sourcetype | sort - _time | head 100

index IN ($selected_indexes$) sourcetype IN ($selected_sourcetype$) (action="$action_tok$" OR NOT sourcetype="aws:waf") | eval ip = coalesce($vh_coalesce_args$) | lookup vh_enrichment_lookup ip AS ip OUTPUT risk_tags | eval risk_tags = replace(risk_tags, "[\[\]\"]", "") | makemv delim="," risk_tags | mvexpand risk_tags | search risk_tags!="" AND risk_tags!="null" | eval s1 = case(sourcetype=="aws:cloudtrail", "CloudTrail", sourcetype=="aws:elb:accesslogs", "ELB", sourcetype=="aws:waf", "WAF", 1=1, "Other"), s2 = case( sourcetype=="aws:waf" AND action=="BLOCK", "Blocked", sourcetype=="aws:waf" AND action=="ALLOW", "Success", sourcetype=="aws:elb:accesslogs" AND status >= 400, "Failure", sourcetype=="aws:elb:accesslogs" AND status < 400, "Success", isnotnull(errorCode), "Failure", 1=1, "Success"), s3 = risk_tags | stats count as real_count by s1, s2, s3 | rename s1 as From, s2 as To, real_count as count | appendpipe [| rename To as From, s3 as To | stats sum(count) as count by From, To] | where isnotnull(From) AND isnotnull(To) AND From!=To | eval Weight = log(count + 1, 1.15) | stats sum(Weight) as Weight by From, To
